Video.summary: Emeril and young chef CJ Calhoun make a meal any kid would love!
Video.title: with CJ Calhoun, Dominique Taylor

Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Tired of the same old chicken recipes? Emeril's prepares two exciting new chicken recipes: tagine of chicken with preserved lemons and olives and prosciutto- chicken roulade served with chard
Video.title: Chicken with a Twist

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Scott Maurer compose an entire meal around Louisiana oysters.
Video.title: with Scott Maurer

Video.summary: New England Patriots superfan Kim Mello helps create New England eats.
Video.title: Boston

Video.summary: Emeril and Voodoo priestesses Brandi and Maggie celebrate New Orleans' annual Voodoo Fest.
Video.title: with Mambo Brandi, Mambo Maggie

Video.summary: Emeril shares the tale of two Louisiana surfers who stumbled on the perfect seaside snack: sea beans!
Video.title: A Surfer's Discovery: Sea Beans

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Creole cream cheese, which was almost lost to time until one family farm helped save it.
Video.title: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Image.alt: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Video.summary: Emeril and jazz legend Kermit Ruffins classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Kermit Ruffins

Video.summary: Dine like a Hoosier with chicken fried steak, barbecue chicken, and sugar cream pie.
Video.title: Indianapolis Colts

Video.summary: Emeril and Chef Aaron Sanchez enjoy a Cuban-inspired menu with a New Orleans spin.
Video.title: with Aaron Sanchez

Video.summary: For a Texan style tailgate, impress your guests with my take on the state's faves.
Video.title: Dallas Cowboys

Video.summary: Emeril and Asia Magee and Chassidy Carter prepare classic down-home dishes.
Video.title: with Asia Magree, Chassidy Carter

Video.summary: Cozy up with Emeril's warming and comforting classics, including hearty chicken pot pie topped with puff-pastry crust and Emeril's super-tasty spicy meatloaf
Video.title: Comforting Classics

Video.summary: Emeril recreates some of his restaurant's best dishes with his son EJ Lagasse and Johnny Slamon.
Video.title: with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse

Image.alt: with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse
with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse
with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse

Video.summary: Emeril and Maggie Long and Cyrus Lester share a meal incorporating fresh mushrooms from their farm.
Video.title: with Mushroom Maggie's

Video.summary: Denver superfan Catherine Highland grills up dishes to honor Colorado.
Video.title: Denver

Video.summary: For your next get together, punch up the menu with Emeril's coffee-inspired recipes!
Video.title: New Orleans Coffee

Video.summary: Couscous Jambalaya, Dirty Quinoa
Video.title: Couscous

Video.summary: Celebrate Cleveland's roots with a Polish-inspired tailgate menu.
Video.title: Cleveland Browns

Video.summary: Oyster Shooters, Steamed Blue Crabs, Citrus-Crusted Tuna with Beer Sauce
Video.title: Maryland by the Sea

Video.summary: Creative Oyster Loaf, Ferdie/Mother's Favorite Offerin', BBQ Duck Sandwich
Video.title: Po Boys 3

Video.summary: Paneed Pork Medallions with Herbed Spaetzle
Video.title: Creative Pork

Video.summary: Green Lasagna, New Orleans Pasta
Video.title: Pasta

Video.summary: Pecan Crusted Fish with Crab Relish, Pecan Meuniere Sauce
Video.title: Pecans

Video.summary: Zucchini Bread, Zucchini Pancake, Zucchini Tian
Video.title: Zucchini

Video.summary: Cheese Fondue, Fondue Bourguignonne, Chocolate Fondue
Video.title: Fondue

Video.summary: Stuffed Caps, Shiitake Relish, Shiitake and Pasta
Video.title: Shiitakes

Video.summary: Coffee Syrup, Mole made with Coffee Extraction, Coffee Anglaise
Video.title: Cooking with Coffee

Video.summary: A trip to a farmer's market inspired Emeril to present creamy turnip and parsnip soup. Plus, roasted chicken breasts with roasted acorn squash, braised pears, and pear cider reduction
Video.title: Cooking Local, Cooking Fresh

Video.summary: Come on, y'all, join Emeril for lightened Southern fare, starting with oven-fried catfish served with sweet succotash, "kicked-up" collard greens, and garlicky cornbread
Video.title: Lightened Southern Favorites

Video.summary: Emeril creates dishes with heart-healthy nutrients: Portuguese-style grilled sardines, salmon with quinoa with roasted shallot and cherry vinaigrette, and mackerel with spinach and chickpea salad
Video.title: Heart-Healthy Meals

Video.summary: Frico Crisps, Crostini with Chicken Livers, Veal Meatballs, Kicked-Up Tzatziki Sauce, Stuffed Grape Leaves, Kicked-Up Fried Almonds, Kicked-Up Stuffed Olives
Video.title: Mediterranean Bites

Video.summary: Vodka and Citrus Cured Salmon, Mini Open-Faced Corn Cake and Salmon Salad Sandwiches, Funky Southwestern Turkey, Rhubarb and Apple Pie with Walnut Crumb Topping
Video.title: Prime Time Emeril

Video.summary: Essence, Seafood and Sausage Pasta with Essence Cream, Fresh Herb Tart, Lamb Stew with Herbs de Provence, Anise Biscotti with Lemon Ice Cream
Video.title: Herbs and Spices

Video.summary: Porcini Salad, Apricot-Glazed Roast Duck with Caramelized Apples, Garlic and Herb Roasted Potatoes, Pear and Stilton Souffle with Pear Compote
Video.title: Hearty Harvests

Video.summary: Barley Lemon Water, Barley and Wild Mushroom Salad, Corn Cakes with Duck Confit and Pepper Jelly, Cornish Hens with Bulgur Stuffing, Kasha Pudding with Dried Fruit
Video.title: Great Grains

Video.summary: Emeril's Bellini, Antipasto Platter, Fresh Pasta with Shiitake Mushrooms, Seafood Risotto, Harry's Bar Cake
Video.title: Venice
